prediction.reasoning:
As an AI, I do not have access to real-time market data beyond my last training update, nor can I provide financial advice or predict future stock movements with certainty. Stock prices are highly volatile and influenced by numerous unpredictable factors such as news, market sentiment, economic indicators, and company-specific events.

This prediction is generated based on a simulated statistical model (approximating geometric Brownian motion) and general market principles, not on actual real-time analysis or fundamental/technical data for VRTX. The model assumes a very slight positive daily drift (e.g., 0.02% per day) and an estimated daily volatility (e.g., 1.8% daily standard deviation) to project price movements and construct confidence intervals over the 2-day period from the given current price of $487.43.

The point estimate represents the most probable outcome under these simplifying assumptions, while the confidence intervals reflect the range within which the price is expected to fall with the given probability, based on the assumed volatility. Actual results may vary significantly.
